title: Functioning of the UK carbon market, 2024
body: "This report provides a high-level summary of the 2024 scheme year of operation, with data showing the performance of the UK ETS for the fourth year of the scheme, covering:   UK ETS infrastructure UK ETS participants (installations and aviation) functioning of the carbon market (supply of allowances, free allocation and auctions) the Cost Containment Mechanism market oversight high-level compliance data   "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
